content.en:
True River Sword Ancestor said: "We went to explore the ruins of the Dragon Scale Saint Realm, and the enemy left quickly, so he left some clues, and the other party obviously also used another Eternal Origin Weapon, the Blood Devouring Bead, this Eternal Origin Weapon is a forbidden weapon, which is forbidden to be used by the Eternal Realm, because it can devour the Supreme One and the Half-Step Eternal Realm, refining the pure power, thus helping him break through the realm." According to our guess, this time there is a mysterious force that is ready to use the Blood Devouring Bead to devour a large number of Supreme Beings and the Half-Step Eternal Realm, thus impacting the Eternal Realm. "

"Can the Eternal Realm still be able to impact like this?"

Some people are very confused.

Zhenhe Sword Ancestor said again: "Naturally, it is not so easy, you also need to prepare various other precious and rare resources, and the success rate is only less than one percent, and even if you break through successfully, it is not a real Eternal Realm, it can only be regarded as a pseudo-Eternal Realm, with the strength of the Eternal Realm, but without the power of the Eternal Realm." The True Eternal Realm can be fused with the Eternal Rules, and after breaking through, and cultivating for a period of time, it can be fused with the Innate Eternal Rules and control the true power of the Innate Eternal Rules. However, if you break through by using the Blood Devouring Bead method, you can't fuse with the Innate Eternal Rules, or even with the Ordinary Eternal Rules. "

"But for some half-step Eternal Realms at the Extreme Realm level, after breaking through the hopeless, using this way to step into the Eternal Realm, as long as they have the power of the Eternal Realm, it is enough, they don't care about the future. "

"Moreover, once you break through to the Eternal Realm, even if it is a crippled Eternal Realm, the real combat power is the real Eternal Realm, and the strength of the Eternal Realm after the breakthrough of the Extreme Realm level is terrifying, and some of the top Eternal Realms after the normal breakthrough of the Eternal Realm are not necessarily stronger than them. "

After the True River Sword Ancestor finished speaking, many Supreme Beings and the Half-Step Eternal Realm were more worried about their safety.

If that mysterious force finds them, they won't be able to compete with a Extreme Realm powerhouse!

Seeing that many Supreme and Half-Step Eternal Realms were panicking, Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor spoke: "You don't need to worry too much, the major forces of the Source Sea are already investigating, although that mysterious force has destroyed many forces, but some forces have a clone of the Supreme One, and the body has not fallen, but the clone has been killed." Through the information of these people, we will slowly collect the origin of that mysterious force, so as to find out them, and then work together to destroy this force. "

At this time, many Supreme and Half-Step Eternal Realms were ready to leave their forces, either staying in the Source God Pavilion all the time, going to the safest place, or just hiding.

In this way, they will not be destroyed by the mysterious force.

And although Ye Tian didn't think that a small force like the Dark Forbidden Domain would be targeted by such a mysterious force, he didn't want to sit still.

In case of real bad luck, the Dark Forbidden Realm is over.

Therefore, he most wanted that mysterious force to be found.

After the meeting ended, Ye Tian took the initiative to stay and said, "Twelve Ancestors, I have the ability to clone and can help investigate, even if it falls, it's not a big deal." "

The True River Sword Ancestor pondered for a moment, nodded and said: "Endless Ancestor, you can help if you want, your cultivation is the Eightfold Supreme Realm, it is not easy to attract attention, but it's us, even if you have the ability of a clone, but the clone is still a half-step eternal realm at the extreme realm level, if we appear, the mysterious force will not necessarily make a move, but you will not be noticed." You can really help. "

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor said: "Endless Ancestor, if you really want to help, I will send you to a force - Lanyue Pavilion, the headquarters of this force is located in the Lanyue Realm, Lanyue Pavilion only has a half-step Eternal Realm, but Lanyue Pavilion has a lot of supremes, and there are thirty-three ninefold supremes, so this force is easy to target." At present, the ordinary half-step Eternal Realm does not dare to help, even the top Eternal Realm does not dare to help the Moon Pavilion, and if the Extreme Realm level half-step Eternal Realm appears in the Moon Pavilion, the enemy will not appear. You go to the Moon Pavilion, and if the enemy appears, notify us immediately. However, the enemy's strength is terrifying, and it is very likely that he will not be able to catch up. "

At this time, Ye Tian assured: "Twelve Ancestors, I may not be able to stop the enemy, but once the enemy appears, I have a way to find out their identity." "

"Really?"

Zhenhe Sword Ancestor and the others were shocked.

According to their understanding, the enemies all hid their aura, and even changed their aura, and the Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm attacked, almost instantaneously killing those ordinary or powerful half-step Eternal Realm and the Supreme.

Even if they are just clones and their bodies are still alive, they don't know each other's identities at all.

But Ye Tian is sure to find out the identity of the other party, is this possible?

"Endless Ancestor, do you have any way to talk about it?" asked the True River Sword Ancestor.

Ye Tian shook his head and said, "This is my secret, please don't ask the Twelve Ancestors, but I can guarantee that once the enemy appears, his identity will inevitably be exposed, and it is useless to kill me instantly." "

The Twelve Ancestors smiled happily, and immediately asked Ye Tian to immediately rush to Lanyue Pavilion.

-------------------

Moon-Boundary.

Ye Tian came here and stayed in a huge city near the headquarters of Lanyue Pavilion.

In the entire Lanyue Pavilion, only the Lanyue Origin Ancestor of the Lanyue Pavilion knew about Ye Tian's arrival, but the other party didn't care about the arrival of a mere eightfold supreme, so he didn't pay much attention to it at all.

Now, Lanyue Origin Ancestor only hopes that the mysterious enemy will not target him.

As for escaping, Lanyue Yuanzu didn't have this idea, Lanyue Pavilion was everything to hers, and she wouldn't run away.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's copy body stayed here, waiting silently.

Finally, on this day, a series of majestic figures appeared around the Moon Realm.

Suddenly, a bead hovered above the Lunar Realm.

This is the Constant Sand Bead of Time and Space!

Airplanes!!!!!

The entire Moon Realm has completely lost contact with the outside world, even if it is a communication thing, it can't be transmitted, and the connection between the ontology and the doppelganger will become very weak, and the doppelganger wants to pass the message to the ontology, and there is a certain delay.

Boom!!!

The world barrier of the Moon Realm was torn apart, and at the same time, a blood-colored bead turned into a river of blood, across the Moon Realm.

Endless creatures were instantly absorbed by the river of blood, and even ordinary supreme beings had no power to resist.

Bang!!!!

Lanyue Yuanzu appeared, and she was very angry and stared at the outside of Lanyue Realm.

"Who the hell are you??"

However, what ushered in was a finger in the air.

This is a finger of the Extreme Realm level, no matter how the Moon Source Ancestor defends, he will be crushed by one finger.

Lanyue Yuanzu still wanted to recover his body, but one finger after another came to kill, instantly igniting Lanyue Yuanzu's body.

Almost in a breath, Lanyue Origin Ancestor was attacked many times, his vitality was completely shattered, and his remnant body was absorbed by the blood river, or rather, the blood devouring bead.

Then, a big hand directly smashed the headquarters of the Lanyue Sect, and those Ninefold Supremes were almost like ants, and they had no power to resist at all.

Ye Tian also saw this finger, but he didn't stop it, because he couldn't stop it.

Of course, his Endless Eternal Body's life-preserving ability is terrifying, even if he is now cultivating to the realm of the Eightfold Supreme One, his life-preserving ability should be even stronger than that of the Lanyue Origin Ancestor.

But it didn't work, once that Extreme Realm was serious, he would still be killed by a breath or two.

Anyway, he had already used his copying talent to find out the identity of this extreme realm, so there was no need to expose himself.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian annihilated this replica body by himself, and the suicide of an eightfold supreme naturally did not attract the attention of that Extreme Realm level half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse.
